title: colea resupinata
intro: Colea resupinata, also known as the "Resupinate Colea", is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Colea resupinata include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to manage diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, Colea resupinata is often used in tea infusions or as a dried extract, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic applications.
